title: Caricinella laevis
taxonomy: Caricinella laevis is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. It belongs to the genus Caricinella, which is a group of plants native to South America. The family Caryophyllaceae consists of plants commonly known as the pink or carnation family. This family is further classified under the order Caryophyllales, which includes a wide range of flowering plants. The classification of Caricinella laevis is a part of the larger taxonomy of flowering plants.
